name: AceForge
description: Self-evolving skill engine — detects patterns, crystallizes skills, manages lifecycle, proactive intelligence, self-validation

crystallizationThreshold.description: Minimum tool recurrences before crystallization (escalates to 5 at 20+ skills)

successRateMinimum.description: Minimum success rate for skill proposals

retirementDays.description: Days of zero activations before a skill is flagged for retirement

notificationChannel.description: Notification channel: telegram, slack, log, or auto (auto-detect)

digestMode.description: Queue notifications during analysis and send as a single digest message

dryRun.description: Observation-only mode: log what would be proposed without writing skills to disk

capabilities.description: Reads openclaw.json for notification channel config. Writes to ~/.openclaw/workspace/.forge/ (trace data, proposals) and ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/ (deployed skills). Optional outbound network: LLM API endpoints for skill generation/review, Telegram/Slack for notifications.

optional.name: ACEFORGE_GENERATOR_PROVIDER
optional.description: LLM provider for skill generation (default: minimax)

optional.name: ACEFORGE_REVIEWER_PROVIDER
optional.description: LLM provider for skill review (default: deepseek)

optional.name: ACEFORGE_NOTIFICATION_CHANNEL
optional.description: Force notification channel: telegram, slack, or log

optional.name: ACEFORGE_DRY_RUN
optional.description: Observation-only mode — log proposals without writing to disk

optional.name: ACEFORGE_SHARED_SKILLS
optional.description: Also deploy approved skills to ~/.openclaw/skills/ for multi-agent sharing

optional.name: ACEFORGE_NOTIFY_DIGEST
optional.description: Queue notifications during analysis and send as single digest

networkEndpoints.description: All outbound network is optional and user-configured. No hardcoded endpoints.
optional: Telegram Bot API (if notification channel is telegram)
Slack Webhook (if notification channel is slack)
